Bash(git commit -m "Fix date sorting by using data-order attributes

- Added data-order attributes to Birth Date and Registration Date columns
- Attributes contain ISO date format (YYYY-MM-DD) for proper sorting
- Removed moment.js date sorting plugin (no longer needed)
- DataTables now sorts dates correctly using native data-order attribute
- Handles ''No record provided'' cases with 0000-00-00 for proper sorting

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Enhance student profile view with comprehensive 127-field display

**Updated profile-sections.blade.php:**
- Added all 127 fields organized into 10 sections matching create/edit forms
- Added FontAwesome icons to section headers for better visual hierarchy
- New sections: Transfer Information, Special Needs & Intervention
- Enhanced Personal Preferences section with all device/internet fields
- Added death certificate fields to parent information
- Added registrant nationality and email fields
- Conditional rendering for Transfer and Special Needs sections (only show if data exists)

**Updated print.blade.php:**
- Added FontAwesome library for section icons
- Enhanced CSS with gradient backgrounds and better typography
- Added left border accent (4px indigo) to section cards
- Improved passport photo border (3px indigo with shadow)
- Better color scheme with professional indigo accents
- Enhanced label styling with uppercase, letter-spacing, and gray color
- Removed auto-print onload - user can now view before printing
- Better print styles with optimized borders and shadows

**Visual Improvements:**
- Professional gradient backgrounds on section cards
- Consistent indigo color scheme (#4f46e5)
- Better hierarchy with section icons and styled headers
- Improved readability with optimized font sizes and weights
- Box shadows for depth (removed in print mode)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Create comprehensive student profile view within app layout

**New show.blade.php:**
- Created modern student profile view that extends app layout
- Displays all 127 student fields in organized cards
- Beautiful gradient header with student photo and key info
- Two-column responsive layout with hover effects
- Sections: Personal Info, SEA, Medical, Preferences, Mother, Father, Emergency, Registrant
- Conditional sections for Transfer and Special Needs (only show if data exists)
- Action buttons: Print Profile, Download PDF, Edit Student
- Professional design with indigo color scheme
- Card-based layout with icons and proper typography
- Grid-based info rows for optimal space usage

**Updated index.blade.php:**
- Changed eye icon to link to students.show instead of students.print
- View button now opens profile within app (not separate print page)
- Updated tooltip from "View Full Profile" to "View Profile"

**Design Features:**
- Gradient purple header (#667eea to #764ba2)
- White info cards with hover animations
- FontAwesome icons for each section
- Uppercase labels with letter spacing
- Responsive grid layout (auto-fit minmax 250px)
- Print-friendly styles
- Professional student management system aesthetic

**User Experience:**
- View student details within the app interface
- Separate Print Profile button for printing
- Download PDF option available
- Edit button for authorized users
- Consistent navigation with breadcrumbs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
